sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The ParticleTemplate class, implemented in Cython, serves as a fundamental building block within the AnalysisG framework for representing individual particles in high-energy physics events. It provides a comprehensive set of properties to describe a particle's kinematics, quantum numbers, and its relationship to other particles (e.g., parents, children, ancestors, descendants). This class is designed for high-performance data access and manipulation, leveraging an underlying C++ particle structure.

sect1.title: The ParticleTemplate Class
sect1.para: ParticleTemplate is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. This allows for direct and optimized interaction with C++ objects and types, which is crucial for handling large numbers of particles and complex event topologies efficiently. It encapsulates a pointer (self.ptr) to a C++ particle_template object, managing its lifecycle and exposing its attributes as Python properties.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. If the instance is not ParticleTemplate itself (i.e., it's a subclass), it returns immediately. Otherwise, it initializes a new C++ particle_template object and assigns its pointer to self.ptr.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer, intentionally left empty as primary initialization is handled by __cinit__ and the underlying C++ object.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. If the instance is not ParticleTemplate itself, it returns. Otherwise, it deallocates the C++ particle_template object pointed to by self.ptr, ensuring proper memory management.
__hash__(self): Computes a hash value for the particle. It converts the first 8 characters of the C++ object's hash string to an integer.

__eq__(self, other): Compares two ParticleTemplate objects for equality. It first checks if other is an instance or subclass of ParticleTemplate using is_self. If so, it compares the underlying C++ particle_template objects.
is_self(self, inpt) -> bool: A utility method to check if the given input inpt is an instance of ParticleTemplate or a subclass thereof.

sect2.title: Properties
sect2.para: These properties provide controlled access to the various kinematic, quantum, and relational attributes of the encapsulated C++ particle_template object. Many properties have both getters and setters, allowing for both retrieval and modification of particle data.

listitem.para: @property index -> int: Gets and sets the unique index of the particle within an event.
@property px -> double: Gets and sets the x-component of the particle's momentum.
@property py -> double: Gets and sets the y-component of the particle's momentum.
@property pz -> double: Gets and sets the z-component of the particle's momentum.
@property e -> double: Gets and sets the particle's energy.
@property pt -> double: Gets and sets the particle's transverse momentum.
@property eta -> double: Gets and sets the particle's pseudorapidity.
@property phi -> double: Gets and sets the particle's azimuthal angle.
@property m -> double: Gets and sets the particle's invariant mass.
@property charge -> int: Gets and sets the particle's electric charge.
@property pdgid -> int: Gets and sets the particle's PDG (Particle Data Group) ID.
@property status -> int: Gets and sets the particle's status code.
@property is_self_particle -> bool: Indicates if the particle is the "self" particle in a comparison.
@property is_from_event -> bool: Indicates if the particle originates from the event.
@property is_from_signal -> bool: Indicates if the particle originates from the signal process.
@property is_from_pileup -> bool: Indicates if the particle originates from pile-up interactions.
@property is_from_hardscatter -> bool: Indicates if the particle originates from the hard scatter process.
@property is_from_parton -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a parton.
@property is_from_truth -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a truth-level particle.
@property is_from_reco -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a reconstructed-level particle.
@property is_from_jet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is associated with a jet.
@property is_from_lepton -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a lepton.
@property is_from_photon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a photon.
@property is_from_neutrino -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a neutrino.
@property is_from_tau -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a tau lepton.
@property is_from_bjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a b-jet.
@property is_from_cjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a c-jet.
@property is_from_lightjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a light jet.
@property is_from_top -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a top quark.
@property is_from_w -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a W boson.
@property is_from_z -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a Z boson.
@property is_from_h -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a Higgs boson.
@property is_from_gluon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a gluon.
@property is_from_quark -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a quark.
@property is_from_electron -> bool: Indicates if the particle is an electron.
@property is_from_muon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a muon.
@property is_from_photon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a photon.
@property is_from_tau -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a tau lepton.
@property is_from_b -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a b quark.
@property is_from_c -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a c quark.
@property is_from_light -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a light quark.
@property is_from_top_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a top quark decay.
@property is_from_w_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a W boson decay.
@property is_from_z_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a Z boson decay.
@property is_from_h_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a Higgs boson decay.
@property is_from_gluon_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a gluon decay.
@property is_from_quark_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a quark decay.
@property is_from_electron_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from an electron decay.
@property is_from_muon_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a muon decay.
@property is_from_photon_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a photon decay.
@property is_from_tau_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a tau lepton decay.
@property is_from_b_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a b quark decay.
@property is_from_c_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a c quark decay.
@property is_from_light_decay -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from a light quark decay.
@property is_from_top_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a top quark as a direct parent.
@property is_from_w_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a W boson as a direct parent.
@property is_from_z_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Z boson as a direct parent.
@property is_from_h_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Higgs boson as a direct parent.
@property is_from_gluon_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a gluon as a direct parent.
@property is_from_quark_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a quark as a direct parent.
@property is_from_electron_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has an electron as a direct parent.
@property is_from_muon_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a muon as a direct parent.
@property is_from_photon_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a photon as a direct parent.
@property is_from_tau_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a tau lepton as a direct parent.
@property is_from_b_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a b quark as a direct parent.
@property is_from_c_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a c quark as a direct parent.
@property is_from_light_parent -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a light quark as a direct parent.
@property is_from_top_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a top quark as a direct child.
@property is_from_w_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a W boson as a direct child.
@property is_from_z_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Z boson as a direct child.
@property is_from_h_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Higgs boson as a direct child.
@property is_from_gluon_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a gluon as a direct child.
@property is_from_quark_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a quark as a direct child.
@property is_from_electron_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has an electron as a direct child.
@property is_from_muon_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a muon as a direct child.
@property is_from_photon_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a photon as a direct child.
@property is_from_tau_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a tau lepton as a direct child.
@property is_from_b_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a b quark as a direct child.
@property is_from_c_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a c quark as a direct child.
@property is_from_light_child -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a light quark as a direct child.
@property is_from_top_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a top quark as an ancestor (any level up the decay chain).
@property is_from_w_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a W boson as an ancestor.
@property is_from_z_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Z boson as an ancestor.
@property is_from_h_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Higgs boson as an ancestor.
@property is_from_gluon_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a gluon as an ancestor.
@property is_from_quark_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a quark as an ancestor.
@property is_from_electron_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has an electron as an ancestor.
@property is_from_muon_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a muon as an ancestor.
@property is_from_photon_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a photon as an ancestor.
@property is_from_tau_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a tau lepton as an ancestor.
@property is_from_b_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a b quark as an ancestor.
@property is_from_c_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a c quark as an ancestor.
@property is_from_light_ancestor -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a light quark as an ancestor.
@property is_from_top_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a top quark as a descendant (any level down the decay chain).
@property is_from_w_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a W boson as a descendant.
@property is_from_z_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Z boson as a descendant.
@property is_from_h_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a Higgs boson as a descendant.
@property is_from_gluon_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a gluon as a descendant.
@property is_from_quark_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a quark as a descendant.
@property is_from_electron_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has an electron as a descendant.
@property is_from_muon_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a muon as a descendant.
@property is_from_photon_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a photon as a descendant.
@property is_from_tau_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a tau lepton as a descendant.
@property is_from_b_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a b quark as a descendant.
@property is_from_c_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a c quark as a descendant.
@property is_from_light_descendant -> bool: Indicates if the particle has a light quark as a descendant.
@property parents -> list: Gets and sets a list of ParticleTemplate objects representing the direct parents of this particle.
@property children -> list: Gets and sets a list of ParticleTemplate objects representing the direct children of this particle.
@property ancestors -> list: Gets and sets a list of ParticleTemplate objects representing all ancestors of this particle in the decay chain.
@property descendants -> list: Gets and sets a list of ParticleTemplate objects representing all descendants of this particle in the decay chain.
@property is_final_state -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a final state particle.
@property is_initial_state -> bool: Indicates if the particle is an initial state particle.
@property is_intermediate_state -> bool: Indicates if the particle is an intermediate state particle.
@property is_stable -> bool: Indicates if the particle is stable.
@property is_unstable -> bool: Indicates if the particle is unstable.
@property is_charged -> bool: Indicates if the particle is electrically charged.
@property is_neutral -> bool: Indicates if the particle is electrically neutral.
@property is_lepton -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a lepton.
@property is_hadron -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a hadron.
@property is_boson -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a boson.
@property is_quark -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a quark.
@property is_gluon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a gluon.
@property is_photon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a photon.
@property is_electron -> bool: Indicates if the particle is an electron.
@property is_muon -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a muon.
@property is_tau -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a tau lepton.
@property is_neutrino -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a neutrino.
@property is_b -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a b quark.
@property is_c -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a c quark.
@property is_light -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a light quark.
@property is_top -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a top quark.
@property is_w -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a W boson.
@property is_z -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a Z boson.
@property is_h -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a Higgs boson.
@property is_jet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a jet.
@property is_bjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a b-tagged jet.
@property is_cjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a c-tagged jet.
@property is_lightjet -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a light-tagged jet.
@property is_reco -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a reconstructed particle.
@property is_truth -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a truth particle.
@property is_parton -> bool: Indicates if the particle is a parton.
@property is_hardscatter -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from the hard scatter.
@property is_pileup -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from pileup.
@property is_signal -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from the signal.
@property is_event -> bool: Indicates if the particle is from the event.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The ParticleTemplate class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class ParticleTemplate: Declares ParticleTemplate as a Cython extension type.
cdef particle_template *ptr: A C++ pointer to a particle_template object, managed by the Cython class.
from libcpp cimport vector: Imports the C++ std::vector type.
from AnalysisG.core.tools cimport *: Imports C++ declarations from tools.pxd, including env and enc for string conversions.
from AnalysisG.core.particle_template cimport *: Imports C++ declarations from particle_template.pxd, which defines particle_template.
